name: [Manager Name]
text: Shivansh consistently delivers exceptional work. His ability to design scalable, cost-efficient AWS architectures while maintaining production reliability is remarkable. He’s one of the most technically sharp engineers I’ve worked with.

name: [Customer Name]
text: Shivansh’s architecture review transformed our cloud infrastructure. He identified critical security gaps and cost optimization opportunities we hadn’t considered. His recommendations saved us significantly on our AWS bill.

name: [Colleague Name]
text: Working alongside Shivansh has been a masterclass in cloud engineering. His depth of AWS knowledge, attention to detail in documentation, and ability to build elegant automation solutions are truly impressive.
